name: Portsmouth (United Kingdom)
description: A blue field charged with a gold (yellow) crescent and an eight-pointed star above it (the historic arms of Portsmouth).
history: Based on the historic civic arms of Portsmouth, granted in 1194 by Richard I — among the oldest civic arms in England. Adopted as the city's flag.

features.symbolism: from the historic arms of Portsmouth, granted by Richard I in 1194 (recalling Richard's Crusader campaigns)
from the historic arms of Portsmouth
